FX.title: [USD/JPY] UP: Rate Cut Delay Strengthens USD Bias as PBOC Fixation Weighs on JPY
tldr_points: Fed rate cuts pushed to late 2026 widens USD-JPY yield spread versus BOJ ultra-loose bias
PBOC USD/CNY fix at 6.8650 reinforces USD strength spillover to JPY
Japan PMI shows manufacturing surge but services drag limits JPY safe-haven bid
FX.excerpt: PBOC rate delay and Fed cuts push delay support USD/JPY higher against structurally weaker JPY
FX.comment: Rate cut delay and PBOC fixation support USD/JPY against structurally constrained JPY

STOCKS.title: [S&P 500] UP: Institutional Inflows Offset Megacap Volatility as Technical Support Holds
tldr_points: Cathie Wood's $900K megacap purchase signals smart money conviction despite broader volatility
Nasdaq-100 ETF outflows from MRA Advisory suggest mean reversion opportunity
Technical structure remains constructive with support zones intact
STOCKS.excerpt: Institutional buying signals outweigh ETF outflows; tactical long setup toward MA20 support
STOCKS.comment: Tactical long bias on support with favorable institutional flow alignment

CRYPTO.title: [BTC/USD] FLAT: Regulatory Headwinds Offset Technical Support; Await Catalysts
tldr_points: Regulatory uncertainty from US political targeting creates headwinds
Technical structure suggests range-bound behavior near key moving averages
Institutional flows remain muted pending clarity on stablecoin legislation
CRYPTO.excerpt: BTC/USD trades in consolidation as regulatory overhang from political targeting offsets technical support.
CRYPTO.comment: Regulatory headwinds from US political targeting offset technical support; await catalyst
